profile.aboutMe1: From the age of eight I started to develop an interest in computers. Since then I've been discovering computer science.
profile.aboutMe2: My first PC was an IBM 300GL under Windows XP. My passion for video games made me discover some notions like Batch scripting, HTML and the setup of a web server. Curious by nature, I often browse developer forums in order to customize my devices (PC, Games consoles, Phones).
profile.aboutMe3: My primary qualities are adaptation, organization and perseverance.
profile.aboutMe4: My career goal is to become a fully-qualified and experienced computer sciences engineer, with the longer-term aspiration of moving into project management.

projects.title: Projects
